episodes.title: Gov. Pritzker denies flying on Epstein's jet, denies meeting financier
episodes.description:
Gov. JB Pritzker denied allegations that he ever flew on Jeffrey Epstein's private jet or met the disgraced financier following a Senate deposition by former President Bill Clinton. Pritzker stated he was never on any plane with Epstein or his associate Ghislaine Maxwell.
